summary: Today's sweep leans toward Democracy / press freedom, Democracy / anti-fascism, Linux / anti-obsolescence. The strongest items in this run are Senate Democrats will force war powers vote, says minority leader Chuck Schumer – US politics live, JD Vance claims US is not interfering in Hungary election, and Anthropic says its latest AI model can expose weaknesses in software security.

mainItems.summary: America’s school districts are operating in a very different reality than they were even a decade ago. Student demographics are shifting so that in just six years, districts have lost nearly 2 million students nationwide.
